name: presentation-skill
description: Source-first PowerPoint/PPTX generation for Codex and ChatGPT agents.

interface.shortDescription: Build editable PowerPoint decks from JSON with style routing, artifacts, and QA.
interface.longDescription: A source-first PowerPoint/PPTX workflow for Codex and ChatGPT agents. The bundled skill writes outline.json, builds editable pptxgenjs decks, routes topics through 13 style families and 13 slide variants, creates chart/table/figure artifacts, and runs QA for geometry, readability, visual review, placeholder text, and reproducibility.
defaultPrompt: Turn this CSV into a lab-style PPTX report.
Redesign this deck and run slide QA.
